reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the first prime minister of Ghana who inspired the literary magazine Okyeame.
2. Using that Ghanaian leader, determine the country from which Ghana gained independence.
original_final_question: literary magazine Okyeame was inspired by this first prime Minister of Ghana whom led Ghana to independence from what country? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which first prime minister of Ghana inspired Okyeame? Evidence: Okyeame was inspired by Kwame Nkrumah, the first Prime Minister of Ghana. -> Kwame Nkrumah
Node 2: Kwame Nkrumah led Ghana to independence from which country? Evidence: Kwame Nkrumah led Ghana to independence from Britain in 1957. -> Britain
